title: zerna korotkiji
intro: Zerna korotkiji, also known as the Bristle Club Moss, is a type of lycopodium, a small, low-growing, and perennial evergreen plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. The medicinal properties of zerna korotkiji include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to improve respiratory function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic. Zerna korotkiji is typically prepared as a tincture or an extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
